subject: Son Goku in Super Saiyan 3 form — long flowing golden hair past the shoulders, no eyebrows, intense forward gaze
description: A male figure with extremely long, flowing golden-yellow hair that extends well past the shoulders fills the frame in a forward-facing power pose. The SSJ3 form is visually confirmed by the hair length — dramatically longer than SSJ or SSJ2 — and the absence of eyebrows, a diagnostic feature of this transformation. The face is set in an intense, determined expression. Blue lightning-like energy crackles in the background and around the figure, and the overall color palette is gold, blue, and white. The figure wears a standard martial arts gi. The composition places the figure dead-center with the massive hair creating a dramatic crown-like silhouette.
foreground: male fighter with extremely long golden hair, no eyebrows, intense expression, energy crackle
background: blue energy field with lightning crackling
